title: nephelium chryseum var. topengii
intro: Nephelium chryseum var. topengii, commonly known as the Topeng rambai or Topeng lychee, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nephelium chryseum var. topengii are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruits, leaves, and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
